description: Pipeline for extracting and cataloging Rock Band 4 songs from PS4 PKG files

fallback_mechanism.description: When .songdta_ps4 metadata is empty/unparseable, songs are looked up in this baseline by shortFilename pattern matching. Contains ~465 songs with missing metadata that were recovered this way.
fallback_mechanism.usage: Loaded in rb4_songlist_generator.py via load_empty_songs_baseline() function

important_notes: PS4 has NO internet connectivity - completely offline, no network-synced entitlements
No central SongList.json or songs.dta exists in RB4 - metadata is distributed across PKGs only
Our extraction method (parsing PKGs) is the ONLY way to get song list from RB4 - there's no 'truth' file to compare against
Baseline file contains ALL 99 free songs from RB4 v1.00 (65) + Rivals xpak (34)
v2.21 update was a maintenance patch with no new songs added
The 4,084 song PS4 count cannot be fully explained - gap source is unknown due to lack of reference data
known_issues: Parallel.ForEach in PkgTool.Core causes file lock race conditions - fixed with DOTNET_ProcessorCount=1

instrument_legend.🔍: Inferred (metadata was empty - recovered from shortName)

filter_example: Search for '🎹' to find songs with keyboard parts
